The '''Battle of Mygeeto''' was a battle during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
After a massive [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Mygeeto uprising|uprising]] on the planet [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]], a fleet of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warships, personally commanded by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], prepared to re-capture the world.<ref name="Ace" />

==The battle==
[[File:Piett_briefing_IA.png|thumb|left|180px|The [[Imperial Ace]] is briefed by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Piett]].]]

The battle itself was split into three sections. The first phase began with the deployment of multiple [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] squadrons to perform reconnaissance runs and combat incoming Rebel [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]].<ref name="Ace" />

The second phase moved the aerial battle into the [[Zuborte Ma|Mygeeto asteroid field]], where Rebel scouts had been discovered. The Rebels conducted a counter-offensive, which saw a climatic battle between the main [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleet]] and the remnant [[Rebel Alliance Navy|Rebel fleet]].<ref name="Ace" />

After hours of ship-to-ship fighting, the Empire emerged victorious, which allowed a clear attack run and ground assault on the planet. The Imperial fleet's [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] proceeded to bombard strategically important targets, including [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] and the main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. Meanwhile, Lord Vader led an assault with [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] units, which led to Mygeeto's quick re-capture.<ref name="Ace" />
